introQueue.label: What they're proud of
introQueue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?
introQueue.description: Separates real wins from performative ones; calibrates their sense of impact.

focus_points.label: Engagement with key stakeholders and feedback loops.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — at this level, managing stakeholder relationships and incorporating feedback is crucial for aligning design with business objectives.

focus_points.label: Areas for growth in UX leadership skills.
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — typical for a Performance & feedback meeting to explore growth areas, especially in leadership skills for a UX Lead.

brief.coreIssue: This 1:1 is focused on evaluating the impact of recent UX initiatives led by the UX Lead, with an emphasis on the quality and polish of deliverables, collaboration with product and engineering teams, and engagement with key stakeholders. Given their lead role, it's crucial to address these areas to ensure continued effectiveness and strategic alignment. Additionally, exploring growth opportunities in UX leadership will be essential for their professional development.
brief.openingQuestion: Can you walk me through the recent UX initiatives you led and share what impact you believe they have had on our projects and team collaborations?
listenFor: whether the initiatives met their intended goals
if they have faced any challenges in stakeholder engagement
if they feel the deliverables met the expected quality standards
avoid: do not focus solely on positive outcomes without discussing challenges
do not let the conversation drift into unrelated topics
brief.goodOutcome: You will have a clear understanding of the UX Lead's recent contributions, challenges faced, and areas for growth in leadership.
brief.suggestedAction: Identify one specific growth area in UX leadership to focus on and set a follow-up meeting to discuss progress in a month.

issues: output may not reflect the meeting type distinctly

queueRef.label: Clarify 'all good'
queueRef.name: When you say 'all good', what specifically went well this week? Any challenges or wins?
queueRef.description: Clarifying re-prompt to surface specifics about their week.

queueRef.label: UX Design Impact
queueRef.name: How do you see your design work impacting our product goals this quarter?
queueRef.description: Explores the perceived impact of their design work on product goals.

queueRef.label: Design Quality Standards
queueRef.name: What specific steps have you taken to maintain high design quality and user experience?
queueRef.description: Assesses actions taken to uphold design quality and user experience.

queueRef.label: Collaboration Effectiveness
queueRef.name: Where do you see collaboration with product and engineering teams needing improvement?
queueRef.description: Identifies areas where cross-functional collaboration could be enhanced.

queueRef.label: Stakeholder Feedback Loops
queueRef.name: How effectively do you think stakeholder feedback has been integrated into your designs?
queueRef.description: Evaluates the integration of stakeholder feedback into design work.

queueRef.label: Leadership Growth Areas
queueRef.name: What specific leadership skills do you feel need the most development?
queueRef.description: Surfaces perceived gaps in UX leadership skills.

queueRef.label: Managing Design Stress
queueRef.name: How do you manage stress when balancing design quality and deadlines?
queueRef.description: Explores stress management strategies related to maintaining design quality under pressure.

queueRef.label: Future Design Initiatives
queueRef.name: What design initiatives do you want to prioritize in the next quarter?
queueRef.description: Identifies personal priorities for future design initiatives.
